name: Korean Casual Summer Outfit Formula — Pastel Shirt & Light Denim
why: Pastel pink or lavender button-down with light-wash wide-leg jeans is such a fresh combo. The soft color pop against the casual denim feels youthful and fun. I love the idea of a cropped pastel shirt with high-waisted light jeans — it's flattering and very K-fashion. The minimalist jewelry (hoops, delicate necklaces) finishes it perfectly.
